name: beads-graph-dry-run-exporter
title: Implement Beads graph dry-run exporter
description: Implement a dry-run exporter that converts active Trellis tasks into a Beads bd create --graph JSON plan without calling bd or initializing .beads.
creator: cses-38
notes: Implemented dry-run exporter at .trellis/scripts/beads_graph_export.py with focused tests. It generates reviewable Beads graph JSON only, prints manual bd create --graph command when writing a file, does not call bd, and did not create .beads.
